title: Purchase Order
description: Represents a purchase order entity in Dynamics 365 Business Central. Purchase orders are documents used to record the purchase of goods or services from vendors. They include header information (vendor, dates, payment terms) and line items specifying the products or services being purchased.

id.description: The unique identifier (GUID) of the purchase order

number.description: The purchase order number assigned from a number series

orderDate.description: The date when the purchase order was created

postingDate.description: The date used for posting the purchase order to the general ledger

vendorId.description: The unique identifier of the buy-from vendor

vendorNumber.description: The vendor number of the buy-from vendor

vendorName.description: The name of the buy-from vendor

payToName.description: The name of the pay-to party

payToVendorId.description: The unique identifier of the pay-to vendor

payToVendorNumber.description: The vendor number of the pay-to vendor

shipToName.description: The name for the ship-to (receiving) address

shipToContact.description: The contact person at the ship-to address

buyFromAddressLine1.description: First line of the buy-from vendor address

buyFromAddressLine2.description: Second line of the buy-from vendor address

buyFromCity.description: The city of the buy-from vendor address

buyFromCountry.description: The country/region code of the buy-from vendor address

buyFromState.description: The state or province code of the buy-from vendor address

buyFromPostCode.description: The postal code of the buy-from vendor address

currencyId.description: The unique identifier of the currency

currencyCode.description: The currency code (e.g., USD, EUR) for the purchase order

pricesIncludeTax.description: Indicates whether the prices on the order include tax

paymentTermsId.description: The unique identifier of the payment terms

shipmentMethodId.description: The unique identifier of the shipment method

purchaser.description: The purchaser/buyer code assigned to the order

requestedReceiptDate.description: The date the goods are requested to be received

discountAmount.description: The total invoice discount amount applied to the order

discountAppliedBeforeTax.description: Indicates whether discounts are applied before tax calculation

totalAmountExcludingTax.description: The total amount of the order excluding tax (read-only)

totalTaxAmount.description: The total tax amount on the order (read-only)

totalAmountIncludingTax.description: The total amount of the order including tax (read-only)

fullyReceived.description: Indicates whether all lines on the order have been fully received (read-only)

status.description: The current status of the purchase order (read-only)

lastModifiedDateTime.description: The date and time the purchase order was last modified (read-only)

purchaseOrderLines.description: The line items on the purchase order

PurchaseOrderLine.title: Purchase Order Line
PurchaseOrderLine.description: Represents a line item on a purchase order, specifying the item, quantity, cost, and receipt details.

id.description: The unique identifier of the purchase order line

documentId.description: The ID of the parent purchase order document

sequence.description: The sequence number determining line order

itemId.description: The unique identifier of the item on this line

accountId.description: The unique identifier of the G/L account (for account-type lines)

lineType.description: The type of the purchase order line

lineObjectNumber.description: The number of the item, account, or asset on the line

description.description: The description of the line item

description2.description: Additional description for the line item

unitOfMeasureId.description: The unique identifier of the unit of measure

unitOfMeasureCode.description: The unit of measure code (e.g., PCS, KG)

directUnitCost.description: The direct unit cost from the vendor

discountAppliedBeforeTax.description: Indicates whether the discount is applied before tax

taxCode.description: The tax code applied to the line

totalTaxAmount.description: The total tax amount for the line (read-only)

expectedReceiptDate.description: The expected date of receipt for the line
